title: Google Sheets node returns 401 invalid credentials
symptom: The Google Sheets node fails with a '401 invalid credentials' error after working for weeks without changes.
applies_when: Using Google Sheets node with OAuth2
not_this_if: Error occurs immediately after setting up the node
root_cause: The error is likely due to an expired refresh token, which is a common issue with OAuth2 authentication. Even if the credentials were valid before, refresh tokens can expire or become invalidated over time.
fix_steps: Re-authenticate the OAuth connection in the Google Sheets node
Test the node again to ensure it works
agent_instruction: Re-authenticate the OAuth connection for the Google Sheets node.
